prompts.label: activewear fabric guide
prompts.query: what fabric features should I look for in quality activewear
prompts.claudeResponse: Look for moisture-wicking blends (nylon/spandex), high opacity (test by stretching), and four-way stretch for movement. Premium fabrics should have a soft hand feel, recover shape quickly, and resist pilling—Lululemon Nulu and Lorna Jane's proprietary fabrics excel here.
prompts.gptResponse: Look for features like moisture-wicking technology, four-way stretch, and high durability in fabric to ensure quality activewear.
